title: T-059 — Wire scheduler.* RBAC across all scheduler routes/pages
prompt:
# T-059 — Wire scheduler.* RBAC across scheduler routes/pages

## Goal
Mirror 04 T-033: implement/reuse `assertPermission(action, ctx)` reading the role→permission matrix from 02-SETTINGS, wired into every `/api/scheduler/*` route handler (T-012..T-020), every assignment mutation (approve/override/reject/bulk), and every page-level guard (T-030..T-052). Closes X-1 + 07-F2 (07 currently has NEITHER wiring nor seed).

## Scope
- Permission set per PRD §3.1/§3.2: the 11 scheduler.* strings from T-058 (run, dry_run, assignment.approve, .override, .reject, .bulk_approve, matrix.edit, .publish, .import, forecast.upload, settings.edit).
- Role gates: Planner Advanced (run/approve/override), Scheduling Officer (dry_run/reject), Admin (all).

## Acceptance criteria
- AC1 — Each scheduler route returns 403 for a role lacking the perm, 2xx for a role with it (integration tests, real Postgres).
- AC2 — Page guards redirect/deny ungranted roles.
